_description: Project-level architectural rules. Each rule is a named check run by release-audit-design.sh against the slice's diff. Rules can be suppressed per-release via architecture-overrides.json.

rules.description: Files changed must be declared in spec.md planned touchpoints
rules.note: If intentional, add to spec.md planned touchpoints or declare in proof.md divergence

rules.description: No single file shall grow by more than 200 lines in one slice
rules.note: Large additions may indicate monolithic code dumps — split into smaller composable units
Files over 500 lines should be decomposed

rules.description: Financial calculations shall use Go/shopspring-decimal, not TypeScript Decimal.js
rules.note: All financial math must happen in Go using shopspring/decimal. TypeScript displays results only.

rules.description: Financial values in Go shall use decimal.Decimal, not float64 for arithmetic
rules.note: float64 is acceptable for loop counters, array indices, and JSON serialization only. Verify context.

rules.description: New dependencies shall be accompanied by an ADR or justified in proof.md
rules.note: New import or dependency detected. Confirm it is intentional and justified in the proof bundle.

rules.description: API handlers shall use auth middleware — no unauthenticated routes outside /health
rules.note: New route detected. Verify it uses the appropriate auth middleware (JWTAuth or AnonAuth).

rules.description: No secrets, keys, or credentials in source code
rules.note: Secrets detected in diff. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.
